def positive_test_makes_real_outbound_http_call_without_mock_or_vcr():
    rule_id = "test_makes_real_outbound_http_call_without_mock_or_vcr"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Test makes a real outbound HTTP request without mocking or a VCR cassette."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
